ValidationRule.description: Any status other than Draft requires SubmissionDate; once set it cannot be cleared.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( TEXT(LoanStatus__c) <> "Draft", ISBLANK(SubmissionDate__c) ), AND( ISCHANGED(SubmissionDate__c), NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(SubmissionDate__c))), ISBLANK(SubmissionDate__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Submission date is required beyond Draft and cannot be cleared once set.
